metadata.heist_focus: messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing
metadata.coordination_problem: information heist where scout sightlines, boggart decoys, and kobold mechanisms prevent alarm cascades
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: angry mountain crows, wax seals, stolen quills, goblin feather cloaks, and purple whisper charms

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with angry mountain crows, wax seals, stolen quills, goblin feather cloaks, and purple whisper charms.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing.

objective_hold.name: Courier Cipher Post
objective_hold.description: Grab the courier cipher before the rookery sends a beard-sealed warning down-mountain.

furniture.name: Rook Nest Shadow
furniture.description: Rook Nest Shadow supports messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing.

furniture.message: The scout wears a nest like a hat and somehow improves it.

break_effect.message: Rook Nest Shadow breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Message Tube Rack
furniture.description: Message Tube Rack supports messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing.

furniture.message: The kobold swaps the tubes so every warning goes to lunch.

break_effect.message: Message Tube Rack breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Bird Bell
furniture.description: Bird Bell supports messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing.

furniture.message: The bell is muffled with feather fluff and stolen wax.

break_effect.message: Bird Bell breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Boggart Feather Decoy
furniture.description: Boggart Feather Decoy supports messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing.

furniture.message: A fake crow insults a dwarf from the safest possible distance.

break_effect.message: Boggart Feather Decoy breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: information heist where scout sightlines, boggart decoys, and kobold mechanisms prevent alarm cascades

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Rookery Cipher Nest lite without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Rookery Cipher Nest route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the lite heist.
